description: DNS-level ad/tracker/malware blocking via AdGuard Home REST API for self-hosted network DNS management

novel_features.name: DNS Health Report
novel_features.description: Summarize AdGuard Home health from locally synced data: protection status, block rate, top blocked domains, stale sync detection, and query volume trends

novel_features.name: Local Sync
novel_features.description: Sync API data to local SQLite for offline search and analysis with resumable incremental sync

novel_features.name: Full-Text Search
novel_features.description: Full-text search across synced data or live API with auto mode that falls back to local on network failure

novel_features.name: Local Analytics
novel_features.description: Analyze locally synced data with count, group-by, and summary operations

novel_features.name: Archive Workflow
novel_features.description: Sync all resources to local store for offline access and search in one command

novel_features.name: Live Tail
novel_features.description: Stream live data changes by polling the API at configurable intervals, emitting NDJSON to stdout
